# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

kind: PluginConfig
apiVersion: KongPlugin20180130  # or higher depending on your kong version
metadata:  
  name: cors-plugin   
  namespace: default    
specs:      
 - key: CORS.origins     
   value: "*"           
 - key: CORS.methods         
   values: ["GET", "POST"]        
 - key: rate_limit           # or 'ratelimit' for Kong version < 2018-06  (for higher versions, use plugin name)   
     enabled : true       
     seconds: 3
